curation_notes: Primary patch commit c7ea001 modified one source file: lib/asciidoctor/include_ext/include_processor.rb. The fix replaced the target_uri? method (which used the weak Asciidoctor::Helpers.uriish? check) with target_http? (which properly validates HTTP URIs via URI.parse). The vulnerable read_lines method passes its argument to IO.foreach and URI.open, which in Ruby interpret pipe-prefixed strings as system commands. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern — the other files in the directory are line selectors, logging, reader extensions, and version metadata. Pre-assigned class command-injection (CWE-78) is correct.
